attributes.action: Stop Convicted Terrorists becoming Councillors and MPs in Britain
attributes.additional_details:
Anyone who has shown they have no regard for Britain and British people do not deserve the right to try to implement change. 
Therefore I want a debate and to bring it to the attention of the world some of us won't put up with it!
attributes.background: I want the British Government to bring in laws that prevent convicted terrorists who have committed terror offences abroad to not be able to become Councillors or MPs.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Ban anyone convicted of terrorism offences from standing for public office
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/759385
